name: Somebody Birdies
challenge: Will anyone in the group make birdie?
rulesText: Each golfer predicts yes/no. Correct calls earn +2.

name: Longest Drive Leader
challenge: Pick who has the longest drive in play.
rulesText: Each golfer picks a player. Correct pick earns +2.

name: Green Hit (Player Pick)
challenge: Pick any active player: will they hit the green in regulation?
rulesText: Template card: select target golfer before tee-off and predict yes/no on their GIR result.

name: Clutch Putt (Player Pick)
challenge: Pick any active player: will they make a putt over 8 feet?
rulesText: Template card: select target golfer and resolve success if they hole a putt longer than 8 feet.

name: Fairway Bet (Player Pick)
challenge: Pick any active player: will they hit the fairway?
rulesText: Template card: select target golfer and resolve success if their tee shot is fairway in regulation.

name: Safe Hole
challenge: Will nobody in the group take a penalty stroke?
rulesText: Yes/no prediction. Correct call earns +2.

name: Trouble Hole
challenge: Will at least one player hit bunker or water?
rulesText: Yes/no prediction. Correct call earns +2.

name: Par 3 Dart
challenge: Will anyone finish inside 20 feet on the tee shot?
rulesText: On par 3, yes/no prediction. Correct call earns +2.

name: No Three-Putts
challenge: Will the group combine for zero 3-putts on this hole?
rulesText: Yes/no prediction. Correct call earns +2.

name: Blow-Up Alert
challenge: Will any player make double bogey or worse?
rulesText: Yes/no prediction. Correct call earns +2.

name: Scramble Save
challenge: Will anyone miss the green and still save par?
rulesText: Yes/no prediction. Correct call earns +3.

name: Bomb Watch
challenge: Will anyone drive it 260+ in play?
rulesText: Yes/no prediction. Correct call earns +2.

name: Birdie Player Pick
challenge: Pick one player most likely to make birdie.
rulesText: Choose one active golfer before play. Correct pick earns +3.

name: Bounce Back Call
challenge: Will the player with worst real score last hole make bogey or better here?
rulesText: Yes/no prediction using prior-hole real-score loser as target. Correct call earns +2.

name: Two-Putt Field
challenge: Will every player who reaches the green take two putts or fewer?
rulesText: Yes/no prediction. Correct call earns +2.

name: Hero Shot
challenge: Will someone attempt an aggressive line/carry/recovery and pull it off?
rulesText: Yes/no prediction. Correct call earns +3.

name: Closest to Pin Pick
challenge: Pick who will finish closest on a par 3 after the tee shot.
rulesText: Choose one active golfer on par 3. Correct pick earns +3.

name: Chaos Prediction
challenge: Will the hole public Chaos card affect at least two players?
rulesText: Yes/no prediction. Correct call earns +2.

name: Fairway Sweep
challenge: Will at least half the group hit the fairway?
rulesText: Manual prop resolution. Will at least half the group hit the fairway? Correct call: +2.

name: Green Sweep
challenge: Will at least half the group hit the green in regulation?
rulesText: Manual prop resolution. Will at least half the group hit the green in regulation? Correct call: +2.

name: Long Putt Drop

name: Clean Card

name: Lone Birdie

rulesText: Manual prop resolution. Will exactly one player make birdie? Correct call: +3.
